title: security_alert
description: A monitoring alert for a security-relevant class of activity. One record per configured alert, normalized across vendors: the source plugin classifies the underlying detection logic into a vendor-neutral event_class so policies can ask 'is an active alert configured for event class X?' without knowing how the alert is wired up.

id.description: Stable identifier for this alert record (event class plus alert name).

provider.description: Source provider that supplied this alert (e.g. aws).

event_class.description: Vendor-neutral classification of the security-relevant activity this alert monitors.

is_enabled.description: True when an active monitoring alert exists for this event class (the detection logic is wired to a live alarm).

has_notification_target.description: True when the alert is configured to notify at least one target (e.g. an SNS topic) when it fires.
